narrative:
Fairfield County has 110,293 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points. Gen X are the largest generational cohort at 26.7% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -4.3% D−R vs -20.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
